scope: Battle Command selected-brigade command compass UI for existing map command modes

verified.notes: TypeScript and Vite production build passed after adding the selected command compass UI.

BattleCommandScreen now derives command compass readouts from existing BattleState and selected-unit state. Compass buttons call the existing toggleCommandMode path for anchor, fallback, frontline segment, facility, and focus target assignment, so no new save or battle-state migration is required.

notVerified.reason: In-app browser localhost URL policy blocks the current http://127.0.0.1:5173/ QA path in this thread.
Mobile/cellphone QA is currently outside the active Takawasi target.

expectedManualFlow: Open Battle Command and select a player brigade.
Verify the 指揮コンパス appears in the selected-brigade panel and shows current click mode, next action instruction, immediate/queued issue state, anchor, fallback, frontline, facility, and focus target.
Click 基準, then click the tactical map and verify the selected brigade anchor changes through the existing map command flow.
Click 後退, then click the tactical map and verify fallback destination changes.
Click 戦線, then click a frontline segment and verify the selected brigade's assigned segment changes.
Click 施設, then click a structure and verify facility assignment changes.
Click 集中, then click a spotted enemy and verify focus target changes.
Enable 予約指揮 and verify the compass issue state changes from 即時発令 to 予約中 N件 as commands are queued.
Confirm console error count is 0 and no compass text overlaps or becomes unreadable at desktop 1440px.
